name: An open-label, single-arm pilot study to evaluate the efficacy of daily low dose tadalafil on depression in patients with erectile dysfunction.
summary: Prospective open-label single-arm pilot study of tadalafil 5 mg daily for 8 weeks in 10 men with erectile dysfunction and mild depressive symptoms, reporting PHQ-9, PHQ-15, and serum BDNF changes.

access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and PMC full-text link available; browser access to PMC was challenged.
access_attempts.notes: Extraction uses PubMed abstract-level results and NCBI metadata.
